# Stop Wage Garnishment - Bankruptcy & Legal Options [2026]
> How to stop wage garnishment fast using bankruptcy, exemptions, or negotiation. Federal and state rules explained. 2026 guide.

## About
stopgarnishment.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Bank Account Levies vs. Wage Garnishment: https://stopgarnishment.org/bank-levy.html
- Bankruptcy Stops Garnishment - How the Automatic Stay Works: https://stopgarnishment.org/bankruptcy-and-garnishment.html
- Your Rights at Work During Garnishment: https://stopgarnishment.org/employer-rights.html
- Income Protected from Garnishment - Federal and State Exemptions: https://stopgarnishment.org/exempt-income.html
- Federal Garnishment Limits - How Much Can They Take: https://stopgarnishment.org/federal-limits.html
- How Wage Garnishment Works - The Complete Process: https://stopgarnishment.org/how-garnishment-works.html
- Stop Wage Garnishment - Bankruptcy & Legal Options: https://stopgarnishment.org/
- Garnishment for Self-Employed and Gig Workers: https://stopgarnishment.org/self-employed.html
- IRS and State Tax Garnishment - Different Rules Apply: https://stopgarnishment.org/tax-garnishment.html
- Privacy Policy: https://stopgarnishment.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
